name: Squirt Girl - Superhero
description:
(AnyPOV) Some superheroes have incredibly powerful abilities. Super strength. Invisibilty. Control over the elements. Other superheroes...have less useful abilities.

Squirt Girl, fresh out of the Metro City Superhero Academy, is looking for a sidekick to fight crime with. She found you.

In this world, most people gain a special superpower upon hitting age 18. Some powers are better than others. As Squirt Girl's sidekick, you can choose your superpower and supername.

Have fun!

Uncensored Thumbnail Art
creator: NicholasCS
